_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Hibernation System Egg
author: vansh737373@github.com
description: PaperMC egg with built-in hibernation support. Auto-shuts down when idle and wakes up when players connect.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Hibernation System Installation Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
curl -sL -o install.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vansh737373/hibernation-system-/main/install.sh
chmod +x install.sh

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The version of Minecraft to download. Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.

variables.name: Enable Hibernation (Auto-Start)
variables.description: If enabled, the server will automatically shut down when no players are online (idle) and wake up when a player attempts to connect. (Only for Java platforms like Paper/Purpur/Bungee)
